TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: O ilisin no Pangcah , ano pakaynien i nika sasiroma no radiw ato fodoy i, malatolo ko nika sa'etal. O no sa'amisan, o no taterongan, ato no satimolan. I tini i sa'amisan hanany i, marapot ko no'amisan no Kiyko ato Ciwidian, pasa'amis tangasa i Takidis. O taterongan hananay i, marapot ko Holin pasatimol tangasa i Kompo ko satimolan. Itini no pasawali i, marapot ko Fakong, pasatimol tangasa i Tomiyac. O notimolan hananay i , maropot ko no timolan no Fanaw ato Madawdaw a maemin tangasa i palidaw i teloc no Taywan. Nikaorira, ano malecalecad ko pikafitan i, nika sasiromaan no paniyaro'an ato wayway no finawlan saka masasiroma to ko ilisin no niyaroaro'. Pakayni i nika sasiroma no mikowanay i, kinapinapina to a mafalic ko ilisin no Pangcah. I kaRiponan ho i, o pades no mato'asay a misakoli, saka padeteng saan caira a misacecay folad a ilisin. Deng sato, yo mangatato a malowid ko Ripon i, palacecay han to a palalen a misacecay lipay ko kahalafin no ilisin. Anini sato, nika sasiroma no demak a mafalic, ira ko cecayay a romi'ad, ano tosa, roma san ira ko misatoloay to romiad a ilisin.
S.PHON: o~u i…ĺisin no~u paŇč ¶ańß , ano~u pakajni…ôn i nika sasiro~uma no~u ra…¨~…ģiw ato~u fo~u…¨~…ģo~uj i, ma…ĺato~u…ĺo~u ko~u nika sa °…ôta…ĺ. o~u no~u sa °amisan, o~u no~u tat…ôro~uŇčan, ato~u no~u satimo~u…ĺan. i tini i sa °amisan ńßananj i, marapo~ut ko~u no~u °amisan no~u kijko~u ato~u ¶iwi…¨~…ģian, pasa °amis taŇčasa i taki…¨~…ģis. o~u tat…ôro~uŇčan ńßananaj i, marapo~ut ko~u ńßo~u…ĺin pasatimo~u…ĺ taŇčasa i ko~umpo~u ko~u satimo~u…ĺan. itini no~u pasawa…ĺi i, marapo~ut ko~u fako~uŇč, pasatimo~u…ĺ taŇčasa i to~umija ¶. o~u no~utimo~u…ĺan ńßananaj i , maro~upo~ut ko~u no~u timo~u…ĺan no~u fanaw ato~u ma…¨~…ģaw…¨~…ģaw a ma…ômin taŇčasa i pa…ĺi…¨~…ģaw i t…ô…ĺo~u ¶ no~u tajwan. nikao~urira, ano~u ma…ĺ…ô ¶a…ĺ…ô ¶a…¨~…ģ ko~u pikafitan i, nika sasiro~umaan no~u panijaro~u °an ato~u wajwaj no~u finaw…ĺan saka masasiro~uma to~u ko~u i…ĺisin no~u nijaro~uaro~u °. pakajni i nika sasiro~uma no~u miko~uwanaj i, kinapinapina to~u a mafa…ĺi ¶ ko~u i…ĺisin no~u paŇč ¶ańß. i karipo~unan ńßo~u i, o~u pa…¨~…ģ…ôs no~u mato~u °asaj a misako~u…ĺi, saka pa…¨~…ģ…ôt…ôŇč saan ¶aira a misa ¶…ô ¶aj fo~u…ĺa…¨~…ģ a i…ĺisin. …¨~…ģ…ôŇč sato~u, jo~u maŇčatato~u a ma…ĺo~uwi…¨~…ģ ko~u ripo~un i, pa…ĺa ¶…ô ¶aj ńßan to~u a pa…ĺa…ĺ…ôn a misa ¶…ô ¶aj …ĺipaj ko~u kańßa…ĺafin no~u i…ĺisin. anini sato~u, nika sasiro~uma no~u …¨~…ģ…ômak a mafa…ĺi ¶, ira ko~u ¶…ô ¶ajaj a ro~umi °a…¨~…ģ, ano~u to~usa, ro~uma san ira ko~u misato~u…ĺo~uaj to~u ro~umia…¨~…ģ a i…ĺisin.
S.FORM: O ilisin no Pangcah , ano pakaynien i nika sasiroma no radiw ato fodoy i, malatolo ko nika sa'etal. O no sa'amisan, o no taterongan, ato no satimolan. I tini i sa'amisan hanany i, marapot ko no'amisan no Kiyko ato Ciwidian, pasa'amis tangasa i Takidis. O taterongan hananay i, marapot ko Holin pasatimol tangasa i Kompo ko satimolan. Itini no pasawali i, marapot ko Fakong, pasatimol tangasa i Tomiyac. O notimolan hananay i , maropot ko no timolan no Fanaw ato Madawdaw a maemin tangasa i palidaw i teloc no Taywan. Nikaorira, ano malecalecad ko pikafitan i, nika sasiromaan no paniyaro'an ato wayway no finawlan saka masasiroma to ko ilisin no niyaroaro'. Pakayni i nika sasiroma no mikowanay i, kinapinapina to a mafalic ko ilisin no Pangcah. I kaRiponan ho i, o pades no mato'asay a misakoli, saka padeteng saan caira a misacecay folad a ilisin. Deng sato, yo mangatato a malowid ko Ripon i, palacecay han to a palalen a misacecay lipay ko kahalafin no ilisin. Anini sato, nika sasiroma no demak a mafalic, ira ko cecayay a romi'ad, ano tosa, roma san ira ko misatoloay to romiad a ilisin.
